name: Voyeur Mode · Net Monitor
author: Douglas J. Cerrato (KB2UKA)
description: Unattended net monitor (zeus-la5): captures each over, transcribes speech to text on-device (whisper.cpp), extracts callsigns and enriches them via QRZ, builds a roster, and writes a local-LLM 'what was discussed' digest. Searchable archive with per-over replay. Speech + AI engines download on first enable. Extracted from Zeus core into an optional plugin.
